title: Don't Play Their Game
description:
DO YOUR JOBWelcome to your new position. Your duties are straigforward: listen to tapes, identify audio anomalies, and complete your shift. Everything you need is already provided. Just focus on your work.

LEARN THE RULESEvery creature follows its own set of rules. Listen for knocks, watch the vents, hide at right moment, and adapt as new mechanics are introduced. Paying attention is the key to staying alive, because every mistake bringes the entities one step closer.

EVERY DAY GETS HARDERNew gameplay mechanics are introduced day after day, steadily increasing the challenge without replacing what you already learned. You'll need to multitask and stay calm under pressure if you hope to survive until the final shift.

TEST YOURSELFOnce you've completed the game, challenge yourself with unique game modes that change the gameplay. Face remixed mechanics, earn achievements, and prove you've mastered every rule the facility has to offer.
description_short: Analyze tapes, identify audio anomalies, and survive each workday as relentless creatures turn a simple job into a desperate game. Don't Play Their Game is a tense first-person horror experience where every mistake could be your last.
